children.heading: Existing programs
children.label: a Existing programs
children.text: Notwithstanding any authorization for appropriations for agricultural research in any Act enacted prior to , there are hereby authorized to be appropriated for the purposes of carrying out the provisions of this chapter, except sections 3152, and 2669 of this title, and the competitive grants program provided for in section 1414, and except that the authorization for moneys provided under the Act of (, as amended; ), is excluded and is provided for in subsection (b) of this section, such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 1991 through 2023.September 29, 1977March 2, 18871224 Stat. 440–4427 U.S.C. 361a–361iSo in original. The comma probably should not appear.1See References in Text note below.2

children.heading: Agricultural research at State agricultural experiment stations
children.label: b Agricultural research at State agricultural experiment stations
children.text: Notwithstanding any authorization for appropriations for agricultural research at State agricultural experiment stations in any Act enacted prior to , there are authorized to be appropriated for the purpose of conducting agricultural research at State agricultural experiment stations pursuant to the Act of (, as amended; ), such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 1991 through 2023.September 29, 1977March 2, 188724 Stat. 440–4427 U.S.C. 361a–361i

children.heading: Funding requirements for programs
children.label: c Funding requirements for programs
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law effective beginning , not less than 25 per centum of the total funds appropriated to the Secretary in any fiscal year for the conduct of the cooperative research program provided for under the Act of , commonly known as the Hatch Act ( et seq.); the cooperative forestry research program provided for under the Act of , commonly known as the McIntire-Stennis Act ( et seq.); the special and competitive grants programs provided for in sections 2(b) and 2(c) of the Act of (); the animal health research program provided for under sections 3195(a) and 3196 of this title; the native latex research program provided for in the Native Latex Commercialization and Economic Development Act of 1978 ( et seq.); and the research provided for under various statutes for which funds are appropriated under the Agricultural Research heading or a successor heading, shall be appropriated for research at State agricultural experiment stations pursuant to the provision of the Act of .October 1, 1983March 2, 1887October 10, 1962August 4, 1965March 2, 18877 U.S.C. 361a16 U.S.C. 582a7 U.S.C. 450i7 U.S.C. 1782
